label: Start Watcher
_comment: This task is injected by the .watcher setup. It runs app_watcher.py in a dedicated terminal panel whenever the workspace is opened. To disable: delete this task from .vscode/tasks.json or set runOptions.runOn to 'default'.
_inputs_note: Add the following to the 'inputs' array in your tasks.json alongside this task definition:

_inputs.description: Port your dev server runs on
